message:
feat(llm): add CLI provider support to doctor checks, self-test, and API key validation

Extend the LLM provider system to recognize "cli" as a provider that
uses an installed tool's own authentication (claude/codex/gemini) rather
than requiring an API key environment variable.

- getApiKey/validateApiKey: treat "cli" like ollama/bedrock (no API key)
- computeDoctorChecks: include "cli" in implicit-auth providers so
  doctor doesn't warn when a CLI tool is the configured provider
- runSelfTest: add CLI provider branch that resolves the CLI command
  and reports pass/warn based on PATH availability
- Update recommended-action messages to mention CLI tools as an option
- Import resolveCliCommand in doctor.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
